title: Cirrus: Fix Makefile including 'hack' in $PATH
body:
This path should never, ever, ever be included in `$PATH` as it is
almost guaranteed to cause serious and non-obvious breakage in CI.  Fix
it and include a warning comment.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: New flake: [timeout in podman build](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4614483497713664/html/int-remote-fedora-35-root-host.log.html#t--Remote-build--containerignore-filtering-embedded-directory-13535---1), first seen in the buildah-treadmill PR last week; I think this might be a new problem with the recently vendored buildah.
